message.content:
@startuml
actor browser
participant G_Shield
participant grabPay

group deduction authorization and charge
  browser -> G_Shield : insure
  alt [authorization]
    G_Shield -> grabPay : deduction authorization
    G_Shield <-- grabPay : authorization page
    browser -> grabPay : confirm authorization
    browser <-- grabPay : authorization result
  end
  G_Shield <-- grabPay : authorization result
  loop [charge]
    G_Shield -> grabPay : silently charge
    G_Shield <-- grabPay : charge result
    G_Shield -> grabPay : confirm receive
    G_Shield <-- G_Shield : underwriting
  end
end

group refund
  browser -> G_Shield : withdrawal
  G_Shield <-- G_Shield : withdrawal
  G_Shield -> grabPay : cancel authorization
  G_Shield <-- grabPay : authorization result
  G_Shield -> grabPay : refund
  G_Shield <-- grabPay : refund result
  browser <-- G_Shield : withdrawal result
end
@enduml
